name: Advanced Features Test
description: Diamond dependency graph with 3 agents, 5 tasks — tests parallel dispatch, TTL expiry, agent crash cleanup, auto-dispatch chaining, and MCP server

modules.name: shared-lib
modules.summary: Shared library used by all services

tasks.name: design-api-schema
tasks.summary: Design the API schema and data models

tasks.name: implement-user-service
tasks.summary: Build user CRUD endpoints and authentication

tasks.name: integration-tests
tasks.summary: End-to-end test suite covering all services

plans.name: api-plan
plans.summary: API implementation plan with diamond dependency graph

cycles.title: Schema design and initial dispatch
cycles.scene: Alpha designs the API schema. Once complete, two parallel tasks unblock.

actions.body: Schema designed. User service: users table with UUID PKs. Order service: orders + order_items. Shared proto for inter-service communication.

cycles.title: Parallel service implementation
cycles.scene: Alpha and Beta work on user and order services simultaneously — testing true parallel execution.

cycles.title: Diamond convergence
cycles.scene: Both services complete. Integration tests are now unblocked — the diamond converges.

actions.body: User service complete. All CRUD endpoints, JWT auth, password reset. 95% test coverage.
Order service complete. Order lifecycle, inventory checks, payment integration hooks.

cycles.title: Integration testing with escalation
cycles.scene: Gamma runs integration tests and hits a cross-service issue.

actions.body: Integration test failure: order creation returns 500 when user service is under load. Possible connection pool exhaustion. Need alpha to investigate.
Alpha increased connection pool size from 5 to 20. Re-run the integration tests.

cycles.title: Deployment and wrap-up
cycles.scene: Gamma deploys everything. All tasks close — the project is complete.

actions.body: Deployed to production. All health checks passing. Zero-downtime deployment confirmed.
